templates.name: Currency Converter
templates.description: Detects currency amounts on any page and shows converted values in an inline popup on hover. Each detected amount has its own currency picker — hover to see the conversion, then change the target currency per element. Supports 30+ currencies with daily exchange rates from the Frankfurter API (https://frankfurter.dev/).
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Currency Converter
scripts.description: Scans the page for currency amounts using regex patterns, fetches exchange rates from the Frankfurter API (https://frankfurter.dev/), and displays converted amounts in an inline popup on hover. Each detected currency amount has its own target currency selector.
